Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover

  • Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.prover 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.control  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.macros  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
    This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io
    Classes related to loading and saving proof files.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.prover  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
    This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.ui  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.util
    This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover used by de.uka.ilkd.key.control 
    Class and Description
    ProverTaskListener
    Listener for longer tasks, which may be run in a separate worker thread.
    TaskFinishedInfo
    An information object with additional information about the finished task.
    TaskStartedInfo
    Used as an event object to inform about a prover task that is just about to start.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui 
    Class and Description
    ProverTaskListener
    Listener for longer tasks, which may be run in a separate worker thread.

    An information object with additional information about the finished task.
    TaskStartedInfo
    Used as an event object to inform about a prover task that is just about to start.

  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover used by de.uka.ilkd.key.prover 
    Class and Description
    GoalChooser
    Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
    GoalChooserBuilder
    interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser
    ProverTaskListener
    Listener for longer tasks, which may be run in a separate worker thread.
    TaskFinishedInfo
    An information object with additional information about the finished task.
    TaskStartedInfo
    Used as an event object to inform about a prover task that is just about to start.
    TaskStartedInfo.TaskKind 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover used by de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl 
    Class and Description
    GoalChooser
    Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
    GoalChooserBuilder
    interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser
    ProverCore 
    ProverTaskListener
    Listener for longer tasks, which may be run in a separate worker thread.
    StopCondition
    Implementation of this interface are used in ApplyStrategy to determine if the strategy should stop or continue.
    TaskFinishedInfo
    An information object with additional information about the finished task.
    TaskStartedInfo
    Used as an event object to inform about a prover task that is just about to start.
    TaskStartedInfo.TaskKind

    Class and Description
    GoalChooser
    Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
    StopCondition
    Implementation of this interface are used in ApplyStrategy to determine if the strategy should stop or continue.
